name: Wishing A Lil Dead
author: Troy/Azaverilania
bootlegger: Once per day, all players may publicly announce a wish, that may be granted, and may have a cost.
All wishes must follow a criteria announced by the storyteller at the start of the day.
The storyteller may choose to grant wishes however they want.
Every player is guaranteed one wish, but the storyteller does not have to tell the player whether or not their wish is granted.
